title: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to
display_title: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to
wikitext:
[]: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by rangure0412 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 5:54 pm Kaji offers to Kaworu going with him and Katsuragi and working the earth. Kaworu accepts. But where? Kaji and Misato are dead, even if Misato is alive why is she working in earth? So is this assuming that they are going to go to another world/reality where they are alive and farmers? Also this takes place before Shinji creates the new world without Evas, so they are not going to this world.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Sat Aug 14, 2021 6:37 pm To me it sounds just another reality. The Anti-Universe is where everything makes one, and in these possibilities Kaworu and Kaji can be together as friends, as they already know each other from the time during time-skip. It is also a good thing to Kaworu since it's a new possibility of a life outside of Shinji.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 6:45 pm We see Kaworu (and Rei) in the Epilogue. So, I guess that's the place where Misato and Kaji are too. I would be tempted to say the Epilogue is a new World, but the appearance of Asuka makes this difficult.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by rangure0412 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 6:56 pm Konja7 wrote: We see Kaworu (and Rei) in the Epilogue. So, I guess that's the place where Misato and Kaji are too. I would be tempted to say the Epilogue is a new World, but the appearance of Asuka makes this difficult.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by Diego » Sat Aug 14, 2021 6:59 pm Konja7 wrote: We see Kaworu (and Rei) in the Epilogue. So, I guess that's the place where Misato and Kaji are too. I would be tempted to say the Epilogue is a new World, but the appearance of Asuka makes this difficult.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 7:06 pm rangure0412 wrote: I have understand that this Asuka Rei and Kaworu are not the same we know. Are their counterparts in the new real world. Clearly Shinji gives to the 3 an ending and this happens before he creates the new world.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by Pluto » Sat Aug 14, 2021 7:17 pm I like how user Xiel described the thematic context Shinji x Kaoru x Kaji scene in this topic in the first post in the context of the scene section . You can read her full explanation there, but to summarize, I will post some of the excerpts below Kaji's saving him seems to be emotional, like Kensuke was to Asuka. "You too saved me" (with Shinji in context). There is a strong emphasis on the three original pilots (Asuka, Kaworu, and Rei) moving on from Eva because they bond with other people in a story that was very Shinji-centric and the three were affected by it. As Kensuke said at the beginning of the movie: Sometimes love comes from unexpected places. Asuka has her scene with Kensuke before Shinji's goodbye and she is returned to his house because her emotional issues were wrapped up by Kensuke. Kaworu's goodbye is interlaced with Kaji reassuring he did a good job so he can "retire" and be happy (leaving along with Kaji) after Shinji releases him from his repetitive cycle because Shinji's now finally happy. Rei has a doll in her hands that is shaped like Toji's and Hikari's daughter when she wonders what kind of place she can belong to in a world without Evas. She doesn't have an Instrumentality scene about this, because the movie already explored Rei Q wanting to stay with that family earlier. The three children found their homes. Shinji needed the three to leave the Evangelions so he can end them, and the three did by finding a place they can be outside their Evas. They need a found family and a place to belong rather than a romantic relationship, at least before the ending (Shinji's potential romantic relationship with Mari is too when both are adults). Shinji's definitely important to them and the one who helps them after falling to their repetitive roles due to "Eva" but alone he couldn't have done this, it was in the bonds they made outside Shinji that gave them the emotional support and closure to grow up, also a place to stay outside Eva. They were trapped in Eva, their roles, symbolically, because there had nothing else in a sense. Asuka's more in your face about what she wants (she envied Shinji's family) in her Instrumentality scene, but if you think about it, it's the first time Kaworu leaned on someone instead of being the one leaned to, sometimes that's all he needed. Because nobody has ever done this to him, other than Shinji in NGE, nobody has invited him to stay anywhere (whether or not Kaworu goes to plant watermelons, he was given that option and invitation) Rei has a full exploration in the village, with her dying wish was to remain longer with her loved ones there. They no longer needed the Evas, their isolation is over.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by Stuart » Sat Aug 14, 2021 7:34 pm Kaworu got the unrequited love role. I feel sad because I'm a Kawoshin shipper, but I'm also mature enough to know that the unrequited love ending is what happens to quality characters in quality works of fiction. RussianRiz wrote: It is also a good thing to Kaworu since it's a new possibility of a life outside of Shinji.

[]: What happened with Rei and Kaworu?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 7:35 pm There is a similar thread about Kaji and Kaworu, but I want to include Rei in this. After Asuka's Instrumentality, we can see that Asuka is launched to Earth in the entry plug (after that, we can see the entry plug arrive close to Kensuke's house). However, we don't see Rei or Kaworu return to Earth. So, I wonder what happened to them. We see Kaworu and Rei (and Asuka) in the Epilogue, but this part is also confusing. Now, I'm not totally sure if they are the same Rei and Kaworu we know. I truly believe there is no need to create an entire thread for this. Let's just bring Ayanami into the equation here - BernardoCairo

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by WILLE_Coyote » Sat Aug 14, 2021 7:39 pm I just wish we'd actually seen Kaworu and Kaji's friendship onscreen before this final scene.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by TyroLuuki » Sat Aug 14, 2021 9:08 pm Konja7 wrote: We see Kaworu (and Rei) in the Epilogue.

[]: Re: Kaji and Kaworu where are they go to?             Quote Post by Bryshe » Sat Aug 28, 2021 8:58 am Konja7 wrote: We see Kaworu (and Rei) in the Epilogue. So, I guess that's the place where Misato and Kaji are too. I would be tempted to say the Epilogue is a new World, but the appearance of Asuka makes this difficult.
